name: Todoist
description: Create, read, update and complete tasks and projects in Todoist. Manage your personal to-do list and project boards via the official Todoist MCP server.

tools_summary.name: todoist_get_tasks
tools_summary.description: Get tasks from Todoist with optional filters

tools_summary.name: todoist_create_task
tools_summary.description: Create a new task in Todoist

tools_summary.name: todoist_complete_task
tools_summary.description: Mark a Todoist task as completed

tools_summary.name: todoist_get_sections
tools_summary.description: Get sections within a Todoist project

tools_summary.name: todoist_add_comment
tools_summary.description: Add a comment to a Todoist task

setup_instructions: Get your API token from Todoist Settings → Integrations → API token. Set as TODOIST_API_TOKEN environment variable.
